introduction: This presentation provides an overview of our cybersecurity investments in 2024. It aims to evaluate our expenditure and highlight its impact on business operations.

subsections.heading: Overview of Cybersecurity Threats in 2024
subsections.content:
• Increase in phishing attacks across the retail industry
• Emergence of AI-based cybersecurity threats
• Increase in ransomware attacks on medium-sized businesses
• The rise of supply chain attacks in the retail sector
• Increase in the use of cloud services, leading to new security vulnerabilities
• Introduction of new data protection regulations globally
subsections.justification: The content provides an overview of general cybersecurity threats but doesn't specify Lee's Market's expenditure on cybersecurity.

subsections.heading: Lee's Market Cybersecurity Expenditure in 2024
subsections.content:
• Significant investment in employee cybersecurity training
• Increase in cybersecurity insurance coverage
• Enhanced investment in cybersecurity infrastructure and tools
• Dedicated teams for cybersecurity risk assessment and management
• Adoption of AI and Machine Learning in cybersecurity strategies
• Partnerships with external cybersecurity consultancies for ongoing support
subsections.justification: The slide discusses the areas of cybersecurity investment but doesn't provide the total expenditure amount.

subsections.heading: Impact of Cybersecurity Investment on Business
subsections.content:
• Significant reduction in successful cyber attacks
• Improved customer confidence due to enhanced data protection
• Compliance with new global data protection regulations
• Increased business resilience against disruptive cyber threats
• Enhanced protection of critical business data and systems
• Increased ROI due to reduced losses from cyber threats
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on the impact of cybersecurity investments but doesn't specify the total expenditure.

conclusion: In conclusion, Lee's Market's investment in cybersecurity in 2024 was both necessary and impactful. Moving forward, we should continue to prioritize this area to ensure the protection of our systems and data.

image_queries.slide_title: Impact of Cybersecurity Investment on Business
